title: Captain Gyokeres for a Burnley bonanza - FPL team of the week
summary: Fantasy Premier League analysis recommends Arsenal attacking assets for their home match against Burnley, with Captain Gyokeres identified as a key late-season fantasy option.
content: Arsenal's home game against Burnley is the perfect opportunity to capture a late-season FPL haul - but which attacking asset should you pick?

zh.title: 队长久克雷斯对阵伯恩利的大丰收 - FPL本周最佳球队
zh.summary: 幻想超级联赛分析建议为对阵伯恩利的主场比赛选择阿森纳进攻球员，队长久克雷斯被认为是赛季末期的关键幻想选择。

title: Fifa risking player safety over heat at World Cup - scientists
summary: Scientists warn that FIFA's heat safety measures for the 2026 World Cup are inadequate and could seriously endanger player health. The protocols are criticized as insufficient for extreme temperature conditions.
content: A group of world-leading scientists warn Fifa its current heat safety measures for the men's 2026 World Cup are "inadequate" and could put players at risk of serious harm.

zh.title: 国际足联因世界杯高温冒着球员安全风险 - 科学家警告
zh.summary: 科学家警告，国际足联为2026年世界杯制定的热安全措施不足，可能会严重危害球员健康。这些协议因对极端温度条件准备不充分而受到批评。

title: Penalty pandemonium sets up Hearts & Celtic showdown for the ages
summary: A dramatic Scottish Cup match featuring controversial penalties leaves Hearts in control of their own destiny. Only Celtic stands between Hearts and progression in a crucial showdown.
content: On a night of bewilderment, there was one unarguable truth. Hearts still have this in their own hands. Only Celtic can stop them, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 点球混乱为哈茨与凯尔特人的经典对决铺路
zh.summary: 一场包含有争议点球的苏格兰杯戏剧性比赛让哈茨掌控自己的命运。只有凯尔特人阻碍哈茨晋级这一关键对决。

title: US drops $15,000 visa deposit for foreign fans with World Cup tickets
summary: The US has eliminated a $15,000 visa deposit requirement for foreign World Cup fans, reversing a controversial policy tied to crackdowns on visa overstays.
content: Fifty countries, including five that have qualified for the World Cup, are subject to the bond requirement as part of Trump's crackdown on visa overstays.

zh.title: 美国取消对持世界杯门票外国粉丝的15000美元签证保证金
zh.summary: 美国已消除对外国世界杯粉丝的15000美元签证保证金要求，推翻了与严厉打击签证逾期相关的有争议政策。
